task_completion.description: Verify that the first page contains the required title and instruction text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of ActivInspire showing Page 1 with the text 'Plotting Ordered Pairs' and instructions containing the phrase 'coordinate plane'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second page has a coordinate plane with labeled axes and quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of ActivInspire showing Page 2 with drawn x and y axes labeled 'x' and 'y', and the four quadrants labeled with Roman numerals 'I', 'II', 'III', and 'IV'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second page has five distinct points plotted on the coordinate plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Page 2 showing at least five visual markers (such as dots, shapes, or crosses) plotted in the correct relative positions on the coordinate plane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the plotted points are labeled with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Page 2 showing visible text labels for the points: (3, 4), (-2, 5), (-4, -3), (5, -2), and (0, 0) placed near their respective plotted points.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Save As' dialog or the ActivInspire window title bar indicating the file is saved as 'coordinate_plane.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire graphical user interface to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ActivInspire application open and being actively used, rather than terminal commands or text editors generating the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created the text, axes, and points using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using ActivInspire's text tool, shape tool, or pen tool to construct the coordinate plane and labels, rather than just importing a pre-made image of a coordinate plane.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved through the application's standard save mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the 'File > Save' or 'File > Save As' menu and the subsequent file explorer dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be exactly 2 pages. Page 1 must include the text 'Plotting Ordered Pairs' and 'coordinate plane'. Page 2 must include a coordinate plane with 'x' and 'y' axis labels, quadrant labels 'I', 'II', 'III', 'IV', and exactly 5 plotted points labeled '(3, 4)', '(-2, 5)', '(-4, -3)', '(5, -2)', and '(0, 0)'. The final file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/coordinate_plane.flipchart'.
